title: Erporkis bracteata
taxonomy: Erporkis bracteata is a member of the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. This family consists of flowering plants that are typically found in tropical and subtropical regions. The Rutaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Erporkis bracteata belonging to the subfamily Rutoideae. The classification of Erporkis bracteata is not yet fully established, and further research is needed to determine its exact position within the plant kingdom. However, it is known to be a unique and fascinating plant species.
